actions.draft: Local-first architectures introduce unique cache invalidation problems when agents need to coordinate across multiple tools — consider implementing versioned snapshots that agents can diff rather than relying on live state. For tool orchestration specifically, you'll want deterministic tool schemas so your routing layer can properly handle context window compression when chaining multiple calls.
